clusters.name: mas_game_theory
clusters.description: Multi-agent systems with game theory, auctions, or decentralized mechanisms (no LLM).
example_titles: Research of New Cloud Agent Game Model
Multi-Agent-Based Framework for Resource Allocation in Cloud Computing
A new multi-agent group-buying auction for automated VM-to-Customer mapping

clusters.name: rl_marl_classical
clusters.description: Classical RL/MARL agents without LLM reasoning component.
example_titles: Video Service-Oriented Vehicular Collaboration: A Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization Approach
Joint Caching and Transmission in the Mobile Edge Network: An Multi-Agent Learning Approach
Optimizing Federated Learning in Distributed Industrial IoT: A Multi-Agent Approach

clusters.name: low_quality_or_unfocused
clusters.description: Survey, review, or low empirical eval; unclear fit to agentic RM scope.
example_titles: NITCO: An intelligent agent technique for optimising of resource utilisation in cloud
A multi agent based dynamic resource allocation in fog-cloud computing environment
Mandrake: multiagent systems as a basis for programming fault-tolerant decentralized applications

clusters.name: devops_monitoring_observability
clusters.description: DevOps, CI/CD, monitoring, logging (not core resource management).
example_titles: Distributed System of Intelligent Content Monitoring Agents
Agent-Based Distributed Data Analysis in Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems

clusters.name: vm_container_placement
clusters.description: VM/container placement, migration, scheduling in cloud/edge (classical or RL, no LLM).
example_titles: Agent-based cloud simulation model for resource management
